doctor_turn: Hello, I’m Dr. Lee. What brought you in today?
patient_turn: Um, hi, Dr. Lee. So, I’ve been having this cough for about a week and a half. It started out, like, not too bad, but now I’m coughing up blood, and it hasn’t really gotten any better… I’m kinda worried.

doctor_turn: How often do you find yourself coughing throughout the day?
patient_turn: Well, it’s pretty much, um, constant, I guess? It’s intermittent, but it feels like I’m coughing a lot, you know? There’s not really anything that makes it better or worse, which is frustrating…

doctor_turn: Can you describe where you feel the cough or any discomfort in your chest?
patient_turn: Oh, you know, I was just thinking about how I need to get some new shoes.

doctor_turn: What does your cough feel like? Is it dry, wet, or something else?
patient_turn: Um, it’s definitely more of a wet cough now, I think? Like, I’m coughing up mucus and, uh, now blood too, which is really alarming. Honestly, it just feels really uncomfortable and, um, concerning…

doctor_turn: Have you noticed anything that makes your cough feel better or worse?
patient_turn: Not really, to be honest. It’s just sort of there all the time, and I can’t find anything that helps. I mean, I’ve tried drinking water and stuff, but it doesn’t seem to make a difference…

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any other symptoms along with your cough, like fever, chills, or fatigue?
patient_turn: Yeah, I’ve definitely had chills and, um, I feel really tired all the time. I’ve also noticed I’ve been sweating a lot at night, which is, like, really weird. And I’ve lost about ten pounds without trying, which is kinda concerning…

doctor_turn: When did you first notice your cough starting?
patient_turn: I’ve been thinking about how much I miss my favorite restaurant back home. The food was just amazing!

doctor_turn: When did you first notice the cough starting?
patient_turn: I think it was about a week and a half ago? It started off as just a regular cough, but then it got worse pretty quickly. I’m really worried about how it’s changed…

doctor_turn: Have you noticed any other symptoms along with the cough, like fever or night sweats?
patient_turn: Uh, I think maybe it started about a week and a half ago, but I’m not totally sure. And, um, I guess I might have some chills or something, but it’s hard to keep track of everything, you know?

doctor_turn: What does the cough feel like? Is it dry, or do you feel any phlegm?
patient_turn: Oh, it’s definitely not dry anymore. It’s, um, pretty wet, I think? I’m coughing up mucus, and now there’s blood too, which is really alarming. It just feels really heavy and, um, concerning…

doctor_turn: Have you checked your temperature with a thermometer recently?
patient_turn: Um, no, I haven’t checked my temperature with a thermometer. I just feel, like, chills and I think I might have a fever, but I haven’t measured it, so I’m not really sure…

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any chest pain at all?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t had any chest pain, which is, um, a relief, I guess? It’s mostly just the cough and the other symptoms, but no pain, thank goodness. I’m just really worried about everything else going on…

doctor_turn: Have you noticed any shortness of breath while resting or during activities?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t really noticed any shortness of breath, um, at rest or when I’m doing stuff. It’s mostly just the cough that’s bothering me, but I’m still kinda worried about everything else…

doctor_turn: Have you felt your heart racing or any unusual heartbeats?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t felt anything like that, um, no racing heart or unusual beats. It’s mostly just the cough and feeling really tired and, uh, worried about the blood when I cough…

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any headaches recently?
patient_turn: Um, no, I haven’t had any headaches. It’s really just the cough and, like, the chills and fatigue that are bothering me. I’m kinda worried about everything else going on, though…

doctor_turn: Have you felt nauseous or experienced any vomiting lately?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t felt nauseous or, um, had any vomiting. It’s really just the cough and the other symptoms, like the chills and night sweats. I’m honestly just really anxious about it all…

doctor_turn: Have you noticed any changes in your bowel habits recently?
patient_turn: Uh, no, I haven’t noticed any changes in my bowel habits. It’s mostly just the cough and, um, the other symptoms that are concerning me. I’m really worried about what’s going on…

doctor_turn: Have you had any trouble sleeping or noticed changes in your appetite recently?
patient_turn: Um, I haven’t really had trouble sleeping, but I guess I’ve lost my appetite a bit. I mean, with everything going on, it’s hard to focus on eating, you know? I’m just feeling really fatigued and, um, worried…

doctor_turn: Have you experienced any loss of taste or smell recently?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t noticed any loss of taste or smell. It’s really just the cough and the other symptoms that are bothering me. I’m honestly just feeling really anxious about everything…

doctor_turn: Have you been exposed to any dust, fumes, or animals recently?
patient_turn: Um, no, I haven’t been exposed to any dust, fumes, or animals. I live in an apartment with two housemates, and I work on an assembly line, but I don’t think there’s anything like that affecting me. I’m just really worried about this cough and everything else…

doctor_turn: Have you ever had a cough or similar symptoms like this in the past?
patient_turn: No, I haven’t had anything like this before. This is the first time I’m experiencing a cough like this, and it’s really, um, concerning for me. I just don’t know what’s going on…

doctor_turn: Do you have any known allergies to medications or anything else?
patient_turn: No, I don’t have any known allergies. I just take some vitamins, but that’s it. I’m honestly just really worried about this cough and everything else happening…

doctor_turn: Can you describe your living situation and who you live with?
patient_turn: Um, I live in an apartment with two housemates. It’s, like, a small place, and we all share the space. I work on an assembly line, so I’m around a lot of people there too. I guess I’m just feeling really anxious about everything going on with my health…

doctor_turn: What do you do for work, and how often are you in close contact with others?
patient_turn: I work on an assembly line, and, um, I’m in close contact with others pretty much every day. It’s a busy environment, so I’m around a lot of people, which makes me a bit more worried about this cough and everything else…

doctor_turn: Do you smoke, drink alcohol, or use any recreational drugs?
patient_turn: No, I don’t smoke or drink alcohol, and I don’t use any recreational drugs either. I just take some vitamins, but that’s it. I’m really just focused on this cough and how worried I am about it…
